_fixture_meta.purpose: Placeholder for a real Vapi status-update webhook payload.
replace: message.call.id          → real provider_call_id from a live call
message.call.assistantId → real VAPI assistantId matching a seeded voice_agent row
message.call.phoneNumberId → real Vapi phone number ID
factory_delta: call.orgId        — NOT present in factory buildVapiStatusUpdate; real payloads include it
call.type         — NOT present in factory; real payloads carry 'inboundPhoneCall' etc.
call.status       — NOT present in factory call sub-object; appears as separate message.status
call.phoneNumberId — NOT present in factory; real payloads reference the Vapi phone resource
call.customer     — NOT present in factory; real inbound calls carry caller number here
